title: Miracle Denim Reviver Sheets - 11cm x 28cm (Pack of 12) - Premium Color-Refreshing Solution for Jeans & Jackets
features: REVOLUTIONARY DESIGN: Miracle denim reviver sheets are specifically crafted at 11cm x 28cm to maximize their effectiveness in restoring the vividness and intensity of your favorite jeans and jackets.

PREMIUM QUALITY: Infused with powerful ingredients, these high-quality sheets penetrate deep into the fabric to not only revive damaged fibers but also prolong the life and color of your denim garments.

EFFORTLESS TO USE: Simply toss a miracle denim reviver sheet into the washing machine drum along with your detergent and let it work its magic, bringing back the rich color and appearance of your denim with each wash.

PERFECT FOR ALL DENIM GARMENTS: Whether it's your classic pair of jeans or a stylish denim jacket, our miracle denim reviver sheet are designed to provide astonishing results on a wide variety of denim items.

ECONOMICAL SOLUTION: A pack of 12 sheets ensures a long-lasting color-refreshing solution, offering cost-effective and time-saving benefits for maintaining the brilliance of your beloved denim collection.
